test_name: Verify User Login with GitHub OAuth
description: This scenario tests the process of logging in using GitHub OAuth and ensures the user is granted access to the dashboard upon successful authentication.
steps: Locate and click on the 'Sign in with GitHub' link.
Enter the GitHub username on the GitHub login page.
Enter the associated password and submit.
Ensure redirection to the primary dashboard at https://dev.roost.ai.
Confirm the user's profile is visible on the dashboard, indicating successful login.
expected_results: Redirection to GitHub login page is successful.
User logs in with GitHub credentials.
User is redirected back to https://dev.roost.ai.
Dashboard displays the user's GitHub profile.
edge_cases: GitHub account with two-factor authentication required.
User's account does not have public email.
data_requirements: GitHub account not banned or restricted.
dependencies: Working GitHub login and authorization pages.
Active GitHub account accessible by the user.
performance_metrics: Latency in redirection to and from GitHub.
Time taken to display dashboard post-login.
accessibility_requirements: Ensure OAuth links are navigable by keyboard.
Screen reader compatibility for GitHub login.
